body:
There is currently this tree:

```
GO:0070818 protoporphyrinogen oxidase activity [no xref]
    |__GO:0070819 menaquinone-dependent protoporphyrinogen oxidase activity [EC:1.3.3.4 {source="skos:broadMatch"}]
    |__GO:0004729 oxygen-dependent protoporphyrinogen oxidase activity [EC:1.3.3.4 & RHEA:25576 {source="skos:exactMatch"}]
```

EC:1.3.3.4 is "protoporphyrinogen IX + 3 O2 = protoporphyrin IX + 3 H2O2", which matches GO:0004729.
- [x] Remove EC:1.3.3.4 xref from GO:0070819.

EC 1.3.5.3 is "protoporphyrinogen IX + 3 a quinone = protoporphyrin IX + 3 a quinol" with comment "In the bacterium Escherichia coli it interacts with either ubiquinone or menaquinone, depending on whether the organism grows aerobically or anaerobically."
- [x] Add EC:1.3.5.3 as exactMatch xref on GO:0070819.
- [x] Add RHEA:65032 as exactMatch xref on GO:0070819.
- [x] Change label of GO:0070819 to more general "quinone-dependent protoporphyrinogen oxidase activity"
- [x] Change def of GO:0070819 to match RHEA, "Catalysis of the reaction: protoporphyrinogen IX + 3 a quinone = protoporphyrin IX + 3 a quinol."
- [x] Replace GOC xref in def with RHEA:65032


RHEA:62000 is "protoporphyrinogen IX + 3 A = protoporphyrin IX + 3 AH2"
- [x] Add RHEA:62000 as exactMatch xref to GO:0070818 and use as def xref (replace existing GOC xref, keep PMID xref)
- [x] Change def of GO:0070818 to "Catalysis of the reaction: protoporphyrinogen IX + 3 acceptor = protoporphyrin IX + 3 reduced acceptor."
title: protoporphyrinogen oxidase activity terms
